title: Oscar Selection Process

title: US Family Planning Aid

title: College Job Advantage
description: Does obtaining a college degree improve employment prospects and earnings in the United States?
narrative: The user is looking for evidence that a college education provides a measurable advantage in the labor market. title: Clear‑cutting Protests

title: Prostate Cancer Detection

title: Electronic Media Impact

title: Compost Pile Management

title: White Collar Sentencing
description: What are the typical or average prison sentences imposed for white‑collar crimes?
narrative: The user seeks concrete information on how long offenders convicted of white‑collar offenses are usually incarcerated, including specific examples of sentences and any reported average length. title: Plastic Surgery Safety
description: What are the safety risks, regulatory oversight, and accreditation standards for cosmetic and plastic surgery procedures?
narrative: The user is seeking information about the safety of cosmetic/plastic surgery, including potential health risks, documented complications, and the role of government agencies and accreditation bodies in regulating and ensuring safe practice. title: Controller Work Conditions

title: African Literacy Rates
